label: Transparent pearl surface motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Pearl transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a pearl surface motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A luminous natural pearl resting in a small oyster-shell fragment, with ivory nacre, blush iridescence, silver shell grey edges, soft oyster-bed shadows in the shell, and smooth reflective surface. Natural luxury identity, crisp cutout edges, not a plastic bead.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include pearl and partial shell without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no necklace, no jewelry clasp, no model, no beach scene, no soap bubble, no text, no watermark, no loose pile of pearls, no gemstone colors dominating.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pearl light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Pearl", derived from a pearl surface cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible luxury commerce UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pearl, Pearl Surface, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from ivory nacre, blush iridescence, silver shell grey, oyster-bed shadows, soft gold highlights, and polished pearl sheen. The board must read as pearl, not marble, moon, or generic luxury beige.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: luxury commerce system, 8px radius, nacre ivory surfaces, pearl blush primary actions, shell silver controls, soft gold badges, oyster ink text, silver borders, nacre shimmer texture, refined product-table and checkout components.
Constraints: no marble slab, no moon imagery, no jewelry model, no beige-only palette, no gaudy gold overload, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pearl", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pearl dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Pearl". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the pearl surface cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pearl, Pearl Surface, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve pearl blush active states, shell silver controls, soft gold accents, oyster dark surfaces, nacre ivory text, subtle shimmer texture, luxury commerce hierarchy, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as pearl, not marble or generic luxury.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: oyster-ink dark backgrounds, shell-grey cards, nacre ivory foreground, pearl blush buttons, shell silver borders, soft gold price chips and charts, subtle iridescent sheen overlay, crisp commerce controls.
Constraints: no marble, no moon, no jewelry-model photography, no pure-black flat background, no gaudy gold UI, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pearl".
